description.value:
You use the power that animates your body to reshape your living stone and transform into one of your comrades. That comrade must be a common Medium-sized humanoid ancestry prevalent where your unit fought (typically in Veskarium space). While these disguises resemble specific individuals, the age of most animate enshrined vesk makes it challenging to find anyone who has personally met any specific enshrined warrior. If you've fought alongside enough or otherwise formed a close bond with a member of your party, your GM might allow you to transform into them as well.

Using Shape Statue counts as creating a disguise for the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Impersonate] use of Deception, but without a @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.Holoskin (Commercial)]{holoskin} or similar disguise, you take a penalty to imitate a non-constructed ancestry. You can remain in your new form indefinitely, but you revert to your base form after 1 hour of @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Unconscious]{Unconsciousness} or 1 minute after death.
